summary: Completed the immediate replay-engine phases: removed regenerated legacy pack artifacts, kept verified replay quickstart passing, added fixture-world and fixture-set install/list/replay surfaces, documented the current local-to-server path, and verified both this repo and the sibling datalox-replay-fixtures repo.

agentTurn.user_prompt: do it phase by phase till all pass, use superpower if need
agentTurn.assistant_summary: Completed Phase 0 cleanup, Phase 1 verified replay quickstart, and Phase 2 fixture worlds / fixture sets. Added direct local fixture install, installed fixture listing, fixture-set install, multi-bundle replay wiring, SDK exports, docs, and regression tests. Verified the quickstart, focused fixture tests, full test suite, TypeScript check, whitespace check, and sibling fixture repository tests.

tool_calls.command: npx vitest run tests/verifiedReplayQuickstart.test.ts tests/replayCanonicalDocs.test.ts tests/repoIdentity.test.ts tests/fixtureCatalogSchema.test.ts tests/fixtureManifestSchema.test.ts tests/installFixturePack.test.ts tests/fixtureSetRuntime.test.ts tests/referenceBundles.test.ts

tool_calls.output_summary: Passed full Vitest suite: 23 test files, 128 tests.
Passed verified replay quickstart: 3 recorded calls, 3 replay hits, 1 expected replay miss, zero upstream calls during replay, tamper detected.
Passed sibling datalox-replay-fixtures repo tests: fixture catalog, fixture sets, manifests, README, and pack command help.

file_changes.diff_summary: Ignored generated verified replay quickstart output.
Added verified replay quickstart and fixture-world usage commands.
Documented the 5-minute record, pack, replay, miss, and tamper-detection loop.
Documented fixture pack install, fixture set install, replay activation, sibling fixture repo shape, and pass criteria.
Updated the roadmap to reflect implemented verified replay and fixture-world phases, with exact repo commands and gates.
Added the later runtime adapter path and explicit boundary between pure replay worlds and runtime-backed rollout.
Added a runnable MCP fixture upstream and demo script for record, bundle, replay, miss, and tamper checks.
Added fixture refs, manifest/catalog/set schemas, cache install/list helpers, fixture set install, runtime resolution, and tool-collision validation.
Added fixtures install/list, fixture-sets install/list, and replay activation through fixture packs, fixture sets, or multiple fixture refs.
Added multi-bundle replay loading, bundle verification, duplicate tool-name rejection, and fixture-aware miss diagnostics.
Exported fixture primitives for programmatic integration.
Added quickstart, fixture schema, install, fixture set, SDK, and canonical-doc regression coverage.

verification.command: npx vitest run tests/verifiedReplayQuickstart.test.ts tests/replayCanonicalDocs.test.ts tests/repoIdentity.test.ts tests/fixtureCatalogSchema.test.ts tests/fixtureManifestSchema.test.ts tests/installFixturePack.test.ts tests/fixtureSetRuntime.test.ts tests/referenceBundles.test.ts && npm run check && npm test && npm run demo:verified-replay && git diff --check
verification.evidence: Focused replay/fixture gates passed. TypeScript no-emit passed. Full Vitest passed: 23 files, 128 tests. Verified replay demo passed with no upstream calls during replay and tamper detection. Sibling datalox-replay-fixtures tests passed separately.
